title: Silky Smooth Italian Prawns Pasta
description: A fresh and light Italian dish featuring sashimi-cut prawns, perfect for a flexitarian meal
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant
Add the prawns to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through
Remove the prawns from the skillet and set aside
Add the lemon juice and white wine to the skillet and cook until the liquid is reduced by half
Stir in the cherry tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes
Drain the spaghetti and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the tomato mixture
Return the prawns to the skillet and toss to combine with the spaghetti and tomato mixture
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then stir in the chopped parsley and grated cheese
